prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为36160→30114→33788→44936→48195，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其2024–2025年连续两年大幅后移，累计后移约1.4万名；2025年基准位次约48195名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021–2025年分别为145→146→147→148→149人，逐年小幅递增；2026年计划161人，较2025年增加12人，扩招幅度约8.05%，扩招力度明显大于往年，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第83名，近年排名稳定在74–85名区间，属于中上水平211院校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校内通报师德师风质疑；2024年声誉亦为偏负面（陕西文科投档异常）；抖音热度总排名第51位（较热），2023年曾进入年度前十（高热），整体关注度中等偏上；历史投档异常信号为低关注（2022年陕西文科位次骤降），对报考心理有轻微滞后影响；风景园林学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；此外林学、林业工程等学科亦为传统优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；风景园林、林学类等农林特色专业热度平稳；山东省2026年考生总数约72万人（较2025年68.1万增长约5.7%），竞争加剧；省控线（普通类一段）近年稳定在437–444分之间，2025年为441分，无明显波动；北京林业大学位于北京市，对山东考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山东省招生计划占比较大，2025年计划149人，属于在京高校在鲁招生规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划扩招约8.05%（缓解竞争）、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）及抖音热度较热（维持关注度）等多重因素，扩招力度略大于考生增幅，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年基准位次略有回落（更易进）；预测最低位次约50324名，区间49824–50824名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约50324名，区间49824–50824名。位次在此区间内的考生建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如低于49000名）可重点冲刺一档的风景园林（梁希实验班）、法学（卓越法治人才实验班）、计算机类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如高于50500名）建议以二档和部分三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province were 36160 → 30114 → 33788 → 44936 → 48195, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, especially with significant backward shifts in 2024–2025, cumulatively moving back by about 14,000 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 48195; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Shandong Province from 2021 to 2025 was 145 → 146 → 147 → 148 → 149 students, increasing slightly year by year; the 2026 plan is 161 students, an increase of 12 students from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 8.05%, significantly larger than previous years, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 74–85 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-high-level 211 institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving internal reports questioning teacher ethics; the 2024 reputation was also somewhat negative (abnormal Shaanxi liberal arts admissions); Douyin heat ranking is 51st (relatively hot), and it entered the top ten in 2023 (very hot), with overall attention at a medium-to-high level; historical admission anomaly signals are low attention (sharp drop in Shaanxi liberal arts rankings in 2022), which has a slight lag effect on application psychology; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), consistent with the university's forestry characteristics, strongly attracting related majors; additionally, Forestry and Forestry Engineering are traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; agriculture and forestry specialties like Landscape Architecture and Forestry have stable popularity; the total number of examinees in Shandong Province in 2026 is about 720,000 (an increase of about 5.7% from 680,000 in 2025), intensifying competition; the provincial control line (regular first batch) has been stable between 437–444 points in recent years, with 2025 at 441 points, showing no significant fluctuation; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Shandong examinees; the university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province accounts for a relatively large proportion, with 149 students planned for 2025, making it one of the larger-scale universities in Beijing recruiting in Shandong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 8.05% (alleviating competition), the increase in Shandong examinees by about 5.7% (intensifying competition), a somewhat negative reputation (slight suppression), and relatively hot Douyin attention (maintaining interest), the expansion rate slightly exceeds the examinee growth rate. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly decrease (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 50324, with a range of 49824–50824.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 50324, with a range of 49824–50824. Candidates with rankings within this range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., below 49000) can focus on Tier 1 popular majors like Landscape Architecture (Liangxi Experimental Class), Law (Outstanding Legal Talent Experimental Class), and Computer Science; those with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., above 50500) are advised to mainly choose Tier 2 and some Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
